description: A general aviation manufacturer is assessing the performance impact of offering a twin-float seaplane variant of their utility aircraft. The baseline model is already open in OpenVSP. Read the float sizing specification located at /home/ga/Desktop/float_spec.txt. Create a new Fuselage or Pod component to serve as the amphibious float. Size it to 5.8 meters in length and approximately 0.7 meters in diameter. Use the Transform (XForm) controls to position it below and to the side of the fuselage: X=0.8m, Y=1.4m, Z=-1.8m. Finally, enable XZ-Plane symmetry (or manually mirror) so that the aircraft has TWIN floats (one on each side). Save the modified model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/floatplane_variant.vsp3.
